---
title: "Comments and Revisions Test"
format: docx
---

Test 
last-modified

## Testing comments
This paragraph contains a comment on this phrase to demonstrate the comment round-trip workflow.
Here is another paragraph with multiple words that have a comment attached.

## Testing revisions (track changes)
This paragraph demonstrates insertions: this text was added by a reviewer.
This paragraph demonstrates deletions:  by an editor.
Here is a paragraph with both inserted content and  in the same sentence.

## Mixed content
The committee recommends that the updated guidelines be  adopted within the next quarter.

## Normal content
This paragraph has no comments or revisions - it should render normally.

- Bullet point one
- Bullet point two
- Bullet point three

This is a test of adding new changes.
